race.comment: SUN TOPAZE (3) was anchored with the 60kg when he knocked up late to finish seventh over 1800m at the Gold Coast. Assess on earlier runs and winning rider goes back on from the low draw. Each way. SINATRA (11) handy gelding who won well two back, then ran below expectations at Ballina with a fading fifth over 1590m at Ballina. Complete mystery last start and gets another chance on the firmer deck. BAILS (10) progressive mare in need of the run first-up with a plugging tenth over 1400m at the Gold Coast. Comes to hand quickly and looking for this trip and further now. VIXENETTE (9) is fourth-up for this after she finished in a bunched finish when seventh over 1350m at Ipswich. Will need a good ride from the gate and don't dismiss over the extra trip. MONARCH EXPRESS (13) is desperate for this trip and strips fitter here.
